category_sources: source_facts.description says Ncurses Sudoku system; official SourceForge page categorizes it as Puzzle Games and describes a text-graphical sudoku game.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nsuds; official SourceForge project title is nsuds - The ncurses sudoku system.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project website; official SourceForge project page is the project summary/support surface.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page includes a Code tab for the nsuds project; source_facts.source-archive is also hosted under the same SourceForge project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official SourceForge project page identify nsuds as an ncurses/text-graphical Sudoku puzzle game.
